caption: A man wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, light-colored suspenders, and a gray bowl-cut wig speaks into a professional microphone. He wears black over-ear headphones and glasses. He is positioned in a room with walls covered in framed photographs and clothing items. To his right, a mannequin is partially visible wearing a black garment. On the screen, red and white logos for "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" appear in two locations: one directly behind the microphone and another further to the right. As the sequence progresses, the man's mouth moves and his facial expressions shift slightly as he continues to talk, while his body remains relatively still. The background remains constant, showcasing a collection of memorabilia and apparel, including a "LEE" brand garment visible in the upper right area.
